transcript:
CALLER: Hello, uh, is this Sunrise Multispeciality Clinic?
AGENT: Yes, good morning! You've reached Sunrise Multispeciality Clinic, Pune. How may I assist you today?
CALLER: Haan, so I wanted to, umm, book an appointment. My wife needs to see a gynecologist. Sometime this week if possible.
AGENT: Of course! We have Dr. Priya Deshmukh available in gynecology. She has slots on Wednesday at 11 AM and Thursday at 3 PM. Which would suit you better?
CALLER: Thursday 3 PM should be fine. Her name is Kavita Nair, and the number is 9823041567.
AGENT: Perfect. I've booked an appointment for Mrs. Kavita Nair with Dr. Priya Deshmukh this Thursday at 3 PM. You'll receive a confirmation SMS shortly. Is there anything else?
CALLER: No no, that's all. Thank you so much.
AGENT: You're welcome! Have a great day.
